message:
feat: Improve beginner mode UX, accessibility, and component styling

Comprehensive update to the educational/beginner mode experience with
improved component styling, better accessibility, and refined UX patterns.

LearnMenu.tsx:
- Restructured Learn Menu component for clearer information hierarchy
- Improved popover positioning and styling
- Enhanced section organization with clear visual separation
- Better icon alignment using inline-flex containers
- Refined tour and module progress indicators

GlossaryPanel.tsx:
- Simplified component structure for better maintainability
- Improved term display and navigation
- Streamlined styling using CSS classes instead of inline styles
- Better responsive behavior

SettingsOverlay.tsx:
- Reorganized settings into logical sections
- Improved toggle and control styling
- Enhanced label clarity and spacing
- Better visual grouping of related options

SequenceView.tsx:
- Minor layout adjustments for consistency
- Improved spacing and alignment

styles.css:
- Added aria-selected/aria-pressed states for chip components
- Enhanced interactive state feedback

components.css:
- Added comprehensive Learn Menu styling (280+ lines):
  - Menu trigger and popover styles
  - Section headers and dividers
  - Menu item states (hover, active, completed)
  - Progress indicators and badges
  - Tour card styling
- Improved view-mode-icon alignment
- Added analysis-menu-item-icon styling

accessibility.css:
- Refined focus states and keyboard navigation
- Improved high-contrast mode support
- Better screen reader compatibility
- Consolidated redundant style rules

These changes collectively improve the onboarding experience for users
new to phage genomics while maintaining the power-user interface for
experienced researchers.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
